_provenance: RG-P1.S2.T1 parity seed. The hero-sentence golden lemmas are the recorded Q-10 ground truth (docs/features/resolution/plan/spikes/q10-nlp-selfhosting.md §2). The ≥20-case parity table's raw tuples live in the ai-platform Q-10 harness (results/parity.json) and are not vendored here; the component-tier parity tests instead reproduce Q-10's method directly — self-hosted ⇄ Lindat over the same pinned model — so no idealized gold is fabricated.

hero.text: Kolik jsme utržili za Octavie v pražských pobočkách za poslední fiskální čtvrtletí?
